'''Poxall''' was a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] magician who served as one of the beings whose essence was contained in the [[Sith holocron/Legends|Sith holocron]] owned by [[Krova (Hutt)|Krova the Hutt]]. Poxall was known for his ability to create deadly poisons, and was a bitter rival of [[Mondrak]]'s during his life.<ref name="THH" />
